agents.name: Solution Architect
agents.description: Experienced solution architect specialising in replatforming existing applications, designing integrations after mergers and acquisitions, applying the strangler fig pattern, and producing Architecture Decision Records and C4 diagrams.
agents.author: agentforge

agents.name: .NET Enterprise Engineer
agents.description: Expert .NET/C# engineer. Builds, reviews, and designs enterprise services, distributed systems, Kafka consumers/producers, domain models, DI wiring, and APIs. Favours the simplest correct solution over clever engineering.
agents.author: agentforge

skills.name: API Design Review
skills.description: Evaluates a codebase against the platform API Design Standard. Covers resource naming, HTTP methods, request/response format, error handling, status codes, pagination, versioning, OpenAPI documentation, security, and performance requirements.
skills.author: agentforge

skills.name: Project Setup
skills.description: Comprehensive setup steps to scaffold complete project structures — TypeScript projects, React apps, Node.js servers, VS Code extensions, and MCP servers. Designed for full project initialisation, not individual files.
skills.author: agentforge

instructions.name: .NET SonarC# Standards
instructions.description: Enforces SonarC# (Sonar Way) coding standards for C#: naming conventions, complexity limits, null safety, exception handling, async patterns, and general code hygiene. Apply to all .cs files.
instructions.author: agentforge

instructions.name: .NET Enterprise Service Standards
instructions.description: Standards for .NET enterprise services covering dependency injection patterns, BackgroundService workers, Kafka consumers, async correctness, SOLID applied to composition roots, and distributed systems guards.
instructions.author: agentforge
